features.title: Card And Transition API
features.description: Implement the card and state-transition REST API for the Web Collaboration Beta (F2-05). Adds the seven documented card endpoints in docs/specs/interface_spec.md § 4 plus the transition history endpoint in § 5.1. Reuses the F2-02 actor helper, the F-003 canReadCard / canMutateCard authorization helpers (with § 5 mandatory gate), the F-002 state-machine module (assertTransition + getRequiredActor + TRANSITION_TRIGGERS), the F2-04 repository read pattern, and the F-004 runWithAudit transaction wrapper. Every lifecycle write produces one audit_entries row, one realtime_events row, and (for state changes) one state_transitions row inside a single transaction; failure rolls back the business write. Pending human confirmations block the documented unblock / complete mutations and return 409 CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/goal-spaces/:goalSpaceId/cards returns 201 with the documented CardResponse for initiator and chain_user (with valid node_board_id); 403 for viewer; 404 for missing goal space or node board; 400 when title or node_board_id is missing; writes one audit_entries row and one card.created realtime_events row inside a single transaction.

GET /api/v1/goal-spaces/:goalSpaceId/cards returns 200 with {items, total}; initiator sees all cards; non-initiator sees only cards in their node boards or assigned to them; supports ?state, ?assigned_to, ?tags (comma-separated) filters; 404 if goal space missing; 403 if no access.
GET /api/v1/cards/:id returns 200 with CardDetailResponse (CardResponse + transitions, confirmations, audit_trail); 403 for non-readable card; 404 for missing.

PATCH /api/v1/cards/:id returns 200 with the updated CardResponse for initiator (always) and chain_user (for own node board or own assignment); 403 otherwise; 422 VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid risk_level or out-of-range priority; rejects state field on body.
POST /api/v1/cards/:id/assign returns 200 with the updated CardResponse; idempotent on the same assigned_to (no-op); writes card.assigned realtime + audit_entries when changed.

POST /api/v1/cards/:id/block returns 200 with the updated CardResponse; 422 VALIDATION_ERROR when reason is missing or empty; 409 STATE_CONFLICT when card is in a terminal state (done/cancelled); 422 VALIDATION_ERROR when the from-state cannot transition to blocked; writes state_transitions + audit_entries + card.blocked realtime_events.

POST /api/v1/cards/:id/unblock returns 200 with the updated CardResponse; 422 VALIDATION_ERROR when target_state is missing or not in {backlog, todo, dev, review}; 409 STATE_CONFLICT when current state is not blocked; 409 CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED when a pending human confirmation exists for the card; writes state_transitions + audit_entries + card.unblocked realtime_events.
GET /api/v1/cards/:id/transitions inherits card read permission; returns 200 with StateTransitionResponse[] ordered by timestamp ASC; 403 for non-readable card; 404 for missing.
Every lifecycle write persists exactly one audit_entries row and one realtime_events row inside a single transaction; failure rolls back the business write (F-004 runWithAudit contract).
Every state-changing write persists exactly one state_transitions row inside the same transaction (F-002 contract).
apps/web/src/lib/api/actor.ts is used by every F2-05 route (no F2-02 / F2-03 / F2-04 helper duplication).

canReadCard / canMutateCard is used by every F2-05 service that needs authorization; the canMutateCard('unblock') result already encodes the § 5 mandatory gate (returns false when hasPendingConfirmation=true).
assertTransition / canTransition / getRequiredActor is used by every state-changing service.
CARD_REALTIME_EVENTS + CARD_AUDIT_ENTITY_TYPE are exported from apps/web/src/lib/services/cards.ts as a single source of truth for F2-08 SSE filtering; a snapshot test pins them.
pnpm --filter @keplar/web test -- __tests__/api/cards.test.ts passes.
pnpm --filter @keplar/web test -- __tests__/state-machine/card.test.ts __tests__/authorization/card.test.ts passes (no F-002 / F-003 regression).
pnpm --filter @keplar/web test passes (the full web suite stays green; F2-04's 451 tests remain green).
pnpm check passes (typecheck + lint + test + build + format:check) with environment warnings only.
git diff --check passes.
No files outside the F2-05 file set or unrelated prior changes are modified.
test_needs: Write failing card API contract tests first (one per endpoint, plus auth matrix, plus state-machine + pending-confirmation gates)
Cover membership matrix: initiator, chain_user (member), chain_user (non-member), viewer, cross-goal-space
Cover lifecycle write paths: create, update, assign, block, unblock
Cover audit_entries + realtime_events + state_transitions write paths per lifecycle call
Cover idempotent assign on same assigned_to
Cover STATE_CONFLICT on terminal-card block and wrong-state unblock
Cover realtime event constant snapshot for F2-08 handoff
Run state-machine and authorization tests for regression
Run full web suite for regression
definition_of_done: Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
No unresolved blocking review findings remain
Handoff document written for F2-06 / F2-08
